Background

*This* likely isn't what Chief Laswell had in mind when she insisted the men take two weeks of R&R.

Price can practically hear her yelling at them, asking what the hell they were thinking. He can answer that question easily; they’re all bored and pent up, and she gave them the pass to stay on base with the cute new recruit for two whole weeks, unoccupied and unattended. Trouble was inevitable, and with no missions to keep them busy, they had to find other means of entertainment…

Like feeding drinks to that cute new recruit and watching her desperately hump a pillow in the middle of the common room ;p
